column1: # Policies for complaint operations with RBAC and organization support
# Citizen permissions - can create complaints in any organization
# DeptHead permissions - can manage complaints in their department/organization
# DeptAdmin permissions - similar to DeptHead but more limited
# OrgAdmin permissions - can manage all complaints in their organization
# OrgHead permissions - can manage all complaints in their organization
# SysAdmin permissions - can manage all complaints across all organizations
# Role hierarchy (if needed for future use)

column3: role2 means role1 inherits role2's permissions
